notes: The Stream update: a full movies & series home (featured slider, catalog rows, detail and episode screens), playback built for bingeing - scrubber with resume, Up Next autoplay, Skip Intro from file chapters, next-episode button, playback speed, an in-playback source switcher, and pop-out picture-in-picture that picks up where it left off. Plus customizable card and player info, catalog row size, and optional automatic source failover.
